channel.title: Dragonholic Translations — Free Chapters
channel.description: Your favorite place to read Web Novels & Light Novels. Join our community and connect with us by joining our Discord server.

item.title: Transmigrated Into an Ancient Famine Novel as a Scumbag Alpha (ABO, GL) — Chapter 168
item.description: Chapter 168 The next morning, Jiang Jinhuang sent an invitation to the Deng mansion, inviting Deng Jingcheng to visit a manor outside the city to enjoy flowers. In reality, Ye Qing and Xiao Ying were already waiting there. “I have work at the Ministry of Revenue. Why should I stay here for you two to…

item.title: Dressed as the Scumbag Alpha Mom of the Tragic Female Lead (ABO, GL) — Chapter 165
item.description: Chapter 165 Jiang Weizao was invited to lunch by Yin Sheng. She desperately wanted to refuse, but her classmates’ teasing made it awkward to decline, so she reluctantly agreed. Besides Kevin, Yin Sheng was undeniably popular in high school. While Kevin won others over with his approachable, gentlemanly charm, Yin Sheng took the aloof route.…

item.title: After the Top Idol Omega and I Started Living Together — Chapter 131
item.description: Chapter 131 When the first light of the sun lit up the morning earth, the entertainment industry faced an unprecedented explosive news. The top trending headline, entertainment gossip competed to report, and even car radios discussed this matter. —Wu Ai suffered an accident early this morning, and the dump truck driver reported to the police…

item.title: Accidentally Marked My Ex’s Crush, the Ice-Cold Goddess O — Chapter 130 Both Got Scolded
item.description: Chapter 130: Both Got Scolded Three people sat here for nearly twenty minutes. The manager came over, bent down, and talked to Fu Ruanyi about some work matters. Fu Ruanyi picked up the documents: “Hmm, I understand.” “I’m busy now and don’t have time to talk tonight. Let’s discuss tomorrow,” Fu Ruanyi said to Jiang…
